CheckTitle: Ensure MFA is required for Azure Management
Description: Verifies that at least one enabled Conditional Access policy enforces MFA when accessing the Azure Management portal and APIs (Microsoft Azure Management app ID: 797f4846-ba00-4fd7-ba43-dac1f8f63013).
Risk: The Azure portal and ARM APIs control all Azure resources. Without MFA for Azure Management, a compromised credential grants full control over cloud infrastructure, billing, and data.

Remediation.Recommendation: Create a Conditional Access policy targeting All Users with the Microsoft Azure Management app (797f4846-ba00-4fd7-ba43-dac1f8f63013) and MFA grant control.
